Class ModElementList

java.lang.Object
java.util.AbstractCollection<ModElement>
java.util.AbstractSet<ModElement>
java.util.HashSet<ModElement>
java.util.LinkedHashSet<ModElement>
net.mcreator.workspace.elements.ModElementList
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Iterable<ModElement>, Collection<ModElement>, SequencedCollection<ModElement>, SequencedSet<ModElement>, Set<ModElement>
public class ModElementList extends LinkedHashSet<ModElement>
Set of mod elements in Workspace. Maintains transient indexes for fast lookup by name and type.
See Also:
